# Agent-Friendly Services Index

> A community-maintained, evidence-backed directory of service entry points for
> AI agents: where the docs are, how to authenticate, what is machine-readable,
> and how fresh that information is.

## Core Files

- [Providers JSON](./generated/providers.json): Full machine-readable dataset with derived badges and freshness. Start here.
- Canonical raw URL for external agents: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Olorinm/agent-friendly-services/main/generated/providers.json
- [MCP server](./mcp/README.md): `npx -y github:Olorinm/agent-friendly-services` — tools search_providers / get_provider / list_categories / get_stats over the same dataset.
- [Provider details](./generated/providers.md): Human-readable fact sheets — all entry points, checks, evidence, dates, and open unknowns per provider.
- [Provider sources](./data/providers/): One YAML per provider (source of truth).
- [Field definitions](./data/fields.yaml): What every entrypoint and check means, and how each is verified.
- [Categories](./data/categories.yaml): Canonical category list.
- [Schema](./schema/provider.schema.json): Provider file schema.
- [Link health](./generated/link-health.json): Weekly probe results for every URL in the dataset.
- [Methodology](./docs/methodology.md): Scope, principles, and how verification works.
- [Contributing](./docs/contributing.md): How to add or update a provider.
- [Agent instructions](./AGENTS.md): How to contribute to this repo as an agent.

## Rules For Agents

- `data/providers/*.yaml` is the source of truth; `generated/providers.json` is its faithful export.
- A missing entrypoint means "no known URL", not "confirmed absent".
- Check statuses: supported | partial | unsupported | unknown | not_applicable.
- Every supported/partial check has an official evidence URL and a per-check `verified` date.
- URL liveness is machine-checked weekly; human-verified facts carry their own dates. Trust accordingly.
